answer: The atlas deployments commands are deprecated as of Atlas CLI version 1.52.0. Use atlas local commands for local deployments and atlas clusters commands for cloud deployments.
The default port is 27017, but you can specify a different port if 27017 is not available.
atlas local setup myDeployment --mdbVersion 8.0 --port <port number> --connectWith connectionString

Deployment created!
Connection string: 
"<connection string URI>"
